characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Big Beautiful Woman: Has a large, plump, completely spherical body, and is absolutely beautiful. Friend to All Children: Miss Spider, who has a particular weakness for orphans, being one herself. In "All Pupa'ed Out," when Squirt and Shimmer want to take care of Cookie the caterpillar, simply learning that Cookie is an orphan is enough to make Miss Spider melt and give in to the request. Happily Adopted: Like three of her children, she is an adoptee, having been adopted by Betty Beetle when she was very young. Last-Name Basis: Her actual name is Flora, but most people just call her Miss Spider. In fact, the name Flora was only used in the Pilot Movie.

characters.name: Miss Spider
characters.description: Big Beautiful Woman: Has a large, plump, completely spherical body, and is absolutely beautiful. Friend to All Children: Miss Spider, who has a particular weakness for orphans, being one herself. In "All Pupa'ed Out," when Squirt and Shimmer want to take care of Cookie the caterpillar, simply learning that Cookie is an orphan is enough to make Miss Spider melt and give in to the request. Happily Adopted: Like three of her children, she is an adoptee, having been adopted by Betty Beetle when she was very young. Last-Name Basis: Her actual name is Flora, but most people just call her Miss Spider. In fact, the name Flora was only used in the Pilot Movie.

characters.name: Holley
characters.description: Blind Without 'Em: In Seeing Straight, Holley mentions that he can't see properly without his glasses.

characters.name: Squirt
characters.description: Dude Looks Like a Lady: He has long eyelashes, and even wears apinkflower on his head. Meaningful Name: Named so after he playfully blew a raspberry at his mother. Nice Guy: He’s quite friendly and was willing to bring a chicken egg to its mother.

characters.name: Wiggle
characters.description: Half-Dressed Cartoon Animal: He’s the only one of his family to have a full ensemble, having shoes, a hat and a scarf. Meaningful Name: Named due to being "all wiggles" when he came out of his egg. Sensitive Guy and Manly Man: The sensitive guy to Dragon and Squirt’s manly man.

characters.name: Spinner
characters.description: Blind Without 'Em: In Basketberry Blues, Dragon uses he's inability to see without his glasses to trick him into thinking he's good at basketball, which boosts his morale.

characters.name: Pansy & Snowdrop
characters.description: Identical Twin ID Tag: She wears a pink ribbon and Snowdrop is wearing a green ribbon. Identical Twin ID Tag: She wears a green ribbon (red in the movie) whilst Pansy’s is pink. Shrinking Violet: She is shy and soft spoken.

characters.name: Shimmer
characters.description: Happily Adopted: She, Bounce and Dragon were adopted by Miss Spider. Pink Means Feminine: Subverted. While she is a pink female jewel beetle, she is quite tomboyish.

characters.name: Dragon
characters.description: A Lizard Named "Liz": He is a dragonfly named Dragon. Happily Adopted: He, Shimmer and Bounce were adopted by Miss Spider. It's All About Me: Dragon tends to be a bit self centered sometimes.

characters.name: Bounce
characters.description: Informed Species: He’s apparently a bedbug, but looks nothing like one. Keet: He is excitable and full of energy. Trademark Favorite Food: Berries, but especially holly berries.

characters.name: Spiderus
characters.description: A Lizard Named "Liz": A spider named Spiderus. Big Bad: He starts as this, though it doesn't last. Early Installment Character-Design Difference: He has pointed teeth in the pilot movie. Green-Eyed Monster: He feels this way towards Holley in the pilot. Henpecked Husband: Many of his darker impulses are kept in check by his wife, Spindella.
